## Data Or Privacy Impact

Does this affect auth, watch history, favorites, ad events, profile data, playback tokens, or persisted user data?

## Evidence

Add logs, screenshots, crash reports, or examples if available.

Do not include secrets, tokens, private user data, production credentials, ad account IDs, service-role keys, or video provider secret keys.
